productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men F10 Trx HG White Sports Shoes
description: When only the best will do, choose adidas for your football boots – every detail has been designed to enhance your performance.  From the outsole to the lacing, nothing has been left to chance and everything has been built for lightweight speed.  UpperAdiTuff suede upper for maximum flexibility, durability and styleadidas patented 3-Stripes in blue on the midfoot for enhanced visibility Padded collar for snug comfortAssymetric lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit and to increase the kicking surface on the shoe inner sideSoft footbed for comfortMidsoleEVA midsole for long lasting cushioning and support OutsoleTRAXION® HG outsole with studs for comfort and grip on hard groundShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
